title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SSC Tube - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SSC Tube - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube:
SSC Tube is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
